final_answer:
Yes, it is written into both [AGENTS.md](/srv/repos/gold-chain/AGENTS.md) and [preferences.md](/srv/repos/gold-chain/preferences.md).

I added explicit rules that `PAXG` and `XAUT` must never be described or handled as burnable root assets. The wording now forces the correct model: root-side `PAXG`/`XAUT` locked and released, Gold Chain-side `GOLD` minted/credited and burned/debited for redemption proof.

Why it matters: this prevents the bridge work from drifting into value-destruction logic or dangerous “generic bridge” language.

Checks: `AGENTS.md` added section is 248 words, `preferences.md` added section is 280 words, and `git diff --check` passed. No code tests were run because this was documentation-only.
